doctrine: Every court pairs a proven claim with a louder non-claim; negative capability is the trust surface.
oracle: an admitted ground-truth oracle (e.g. a pinned reference implementation)

courts.name: example sealed byte court
courts.proven: decodes the field bytes exactly; round-trips the sign
courts.not_proven: arithmetic; edited pictures; other dialects; runtime control flow
courts.breaks_claim: computing a result; executing a statement
courts.damage_if_overclaimed: treating a decode as a runtime guarantee

courts.name: example observed atlas
courts.proven: observes a runtime behavior under the witness
courts.not_proven: implementing the behavior; all dialects; runtime execution
courts.damage_if_overclaimed: treating the observation as an implementation
